nasb.text: Then the Lord God said, “It is not good for the man to be alone; I will make him a helper suitable for him.”

esv.text: Then the Lord God said, “It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a helper fit for him.”

cnv.text: 耶和華　神說：“那人獨居不好，我要為他造個和他相配的幫手。”

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝说：“那人独自一人不好，我要为他造一个相配的帮手。”

csbs.text: 耶和华神又说：“那人孤身不好，我要为他造一个合适的帮助者。”
